Server.Name: War3zuk FarmLife 5.6
Server.Description:
**IMPORTANT** 5.6 Final Version 5.6 7D2D v2.5 B32 Stable (5.6 REQUIRES A FRESH GAME DUE TO NEW CHALLENGE and QUEST CODE) too much has been updated to play on an old game.. This includes updates from the following.. read patch info.. 5.5 + 5.6 Final (MAJOR UPDATE)
Version 5.6 7D2D v2.5 B32 Stable
Fixed plantedCannabis1 (Unlock) Fixed plantedCannabisRed1 (Unlock) Fixed FertiliserDesc (Localisation Info)
Rebuilt Sounds.xml Including Sound Files.. Rebuilt Dairy Churn (Model) Added Dairy Churn (Sounds) Added CasinoCoin (Renamed/Token) Added CasinoToken (Description) Added Station/Benches (UIIcons)
Adjusted War3zuk Quest Reward Harvest02 (Loot)
Version 5.5 7D2D v2.5 B27 Stable
Cleaned Old Icon Code Removed 46 Unused Icons Renamed 103 Icons
Added Custom cntBirdnest (Model/Biome) Added Custom cntBirdnestEmpty (Model/Biome) Added HDForrestRedux (20 Models/Biome) Added HDPineTall2Bees (1 Model/Biome) Added ResourceLiquidHoney (Item) Added ResourceLiquidHoney (Recipe) Added HarvestRandomHelper (Icon)
Added Custom FarmLife Tractor (Model/Paid) Added Custom TractorPlaceable (Item) Added FarmLife Tractor Accessories (Recipe) Added FarmLife Tractor Chassis (Recipe) Added Custom FarmLife Axe (Model/Paid) Added Custom FarmLife Shovel (Model/Paid)
Added Custom whiteRiverCitizen1 (MissionLoot) Added Custom intro_buried_supplies (MissionLoot/Farming) Added Custom tier1_buried_supplies (MissionLoot/Farming) Added Custom tier2_buried_supplies (MissionLoot/Farming) Added Custom tier3_buried_supplies (MissionLoot/Farming)
Added Custom LootTable (Pallets) Added Custom LootTable (ArmyTrucks) Added Custom LootTable (Tractors/BackHoes) Added HDSexyJen Trader (CropTop/Covered) Added UtilitySink Working (PlumbingKit) Added Weed Wacker 5000 (Progression)
Added Challenge FarmLife Farmer Added Challenge FarmLife Cook Added Challenge FarmLife Benches Added Challenge FarmLife Harvest 01 Added Challenge FarmLife Harvest 02 Added Challenge FarmLife Armor
Updated trader_bob (Edited/POI) Updated trader_hugh (Edited/POI) Updated trader_jen (Edited/POI) Updated trader_joel (Edited/POI) Updated trader_rekt (Edited/POI)
Updated playerBackpack Size (11x12) Updated vehicleBicycle Size (2x10) Updated vehicleMinibike Size (4x10) Updated vehicleMotorcycle Size (6x10) Updated vehicleGyrocopter Size (6x10) Updated vehicle4x4Truck Size (9x10)
Updated Farm Table Model (2x2x1) Updated FL Storage Cryo (Model/Paid) Updated FL Storage Drinks (Model/Paid) Updated FL Storage Fruits (Model/Paid) Updated FL Storage Food (Model/Paid) Updated FL Storage Seeds (Model/Paid)
Custom Loading Screen (INFO)
Edited cntApiary (Recipe)
Fixed KitchNaid (Fuel) Fixed SoyBean (Spelling) Fixed Flax Fiber (ExtraItem) Fixed FarmLife Tractor (Particles)
**INVENTORY HAS CHANGED TO 105 SO ALL ITEMS MUST BE REMOVED FROM THERE BEFORE UPDATING**
**(REQUIRES A FRESH GAME)**
War3zuk Farmlife 5.6 Vanilla Install V2.5 B32 (This is a standalone installer version and is NOT to be used along side my main War3zuk Overhaul)
What this Mod is about, This Mod is a complete overhaul and update of the original Farmlife from alpha 17 that was discontinued when it became so out of date it was un-usable.. This overhaul has a complete array of custom trees, Plants And its own models all paid for by myself so that the mod is as nice looking as possible.. You have a full selection of Seeds, Fruits, Berries and so on so you can make lots of different types of foods to compliment the main game.You can craft and build an entire farm along with custom animals, Benches and so on. Learning curve is a little steep but well worth it if your into Farming
All Rights Reserved,2018,2019,2020,2021,2022,2023,2024,2025,2026.
